X.essay: Sharp review of committed Code E: correctly identifies hardcoded quota (used:0), missing sourceMode gate, missing ApiPlanLimitExceeded/usage_ledger, and maps gaps to PRD/RFC with concrete fixes. Clean focus on the intended slice; a few soft P2s (caching, const mutation) are minor noise.

Y.essay: Excellent review: catches both the real MVP gaps (no usage ledger / PLAN_LIMIT) and a P0 working-tree route wipe that broke dashboard tests, with clear revert instructions. Spec grounding via RFC M1–M3 phase table is outstanding. Slightly mixes transient working-tree damage with committed-code defects, but labels them correctly.
